content: We can frame Self-Refine as a single-perspective iterative refinement primitive that can be plugged into multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data, while resolving its limitation of getting stuck in local optima from homogeneous self-feedback. This hybrid framework leverages the inconsistency between multiple reflective perspectives to expose unrecognized flaws in iteratively refined outputs that a single Self-Refine loop would miss.
